Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We have three cases case 1 case 2 case 3 The event log is given We need to analyze based on strict normative rules and desiderata

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check normative constraints Case 1 is Approved so Finalize Documentation must be before Close Case and it is Ordering rules Credit Check before Risk Assessment yes Risk Assessment before Loan Decision yes Inform Applicant after Loan Decision yes If approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case yes So case 1 seems fully compliant No skipping no reversed order no contradictory actions So normative violations none

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Application Received Risk Assessment No prior Credit Check violates normative Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Not allowed after rejection Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Credit Check must be before Risk Assessment Here Risk Assessment occurs before Credit Check so violation Also Loan Decision Rejected should not have Finalize Documentation They did Finalize Documentation after rejection Thats a violation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The case also seems to skip Inform Applicant after Loan Decision we have Finalize Documentation and then Close Case No Inform Applicant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome Thats a strict rule So missing Inform Applicant is also a violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Application Received Credit Check happened more than 24 hours later Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant later than recommended 48 hours Finalize Documentation Close Case No Follow up Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check normative constraints Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Thats exactly what we have with Approved All ordering rules satisfied Credit Check before Risk Assessment yes Risk Assessment before Loan Decision yes Inform Applicant after Loan Decision yes Finalize Documentation before Close Case yes So normative violations none

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The desiderata include Credit Check completed within 24 hours after the application is received applicant informed within 48 hours of the loan decision and encouraged to perform a Follow up Call before closing the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Credit Check occurs about 2 days later so desideratum violation Inform Applicant occurs about 2 days and 3 hours after Loan Decision so violation Also no Follow up Call so desideratum violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Credit Check happened 1 hour after Application Received so that desideratum is met Inform Applicant is missing which is a normative violation not a timing desideratum issue The follow up call is also missing so case 2 fails that desideratum

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Credit Check within 24 hours and Inform Applicant within 48 hours are both satisfied But there is no Follow up Call so case 1 fails that recommended practice

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 3 the delays are only desiderata not hard rules Possible reasons for delay could be workload waiting for additional information or operational delays The missing follow up call is optional

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 2 there is no plausible interpretation that aligns with the strict constraints because the order is reversed a mandatory inform step is missing and finalization occurs after rejection It likely indicates a process error or non compliance
